28799500.title: Micky Flanagan
28799500.extract: Michael John Flanagan (born 7 October 1962) is an English comedian. Flanagan has performed at the Edinburgh Fringe and toured Britain with stand-up shows. He presented Micky Flanagan: What Chance Change? for Radio 4 and has appeared on various TV shows including Mock the Week, A League of Their Own, 8 Out of 10 Cats,  Was It Something I Said?, Michael McIntyre's Comedy Roadshow and I Love My Country.
